CVE-2007-4460.title: The RenderV2ToFile function in tag_file.cpp in id3lib (aka libid3 ...
CVE-2007-4460.description: The RenderV2ToFile function in tag_file.cpp in id3lib (aka libid3) 3.8.3 allows local users to overwrite arbitrary files via a symlink attack on a temporary file whose name is constructed from the name of a file being tagged.
